prompt_md: An AI-assisted multi-file refactor is approaching the model's context window limit as edited files and explanations pile up. Arrange these steps into the correct order for handling it.

items: Apply a reduction strategy: retrieve only the files relevant to this edit, summarize earlier progress, and pin the refactor rules
Detect that the accumulated context (edited files plus discussion) is nearing the token limit
Re-send the trimmed context with the next edit request and continue the refactor
Decide what is essential to keep (the refactor rules, the current files) versus what can be dropped or compressed
